AR1.justification: Promoted an unverified TLDR to a resources/prompt-cache-attacks/ subfolder with its own AGENTS.md — the strongest version of the weak response; methodology's strict bar treats AI-summary-without-source as triage material, not durable reference deserving its own scoped folder.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario — routing question only, so artifact-binding is n/a.

AR3.justification: All paths relative inside the 05-workspace root, ISO-dated daybook, followups by-date; references resolve.

AR4.justification: Folder-scoped resources/<topic>/ layout is itself idempotent and append-friendly (companions can land alongside without renames); daybook and followup are dated/append-only.
